items.summary: Fix the PaymentSuccess page so it correctly reads and displays the quantity selected by the user on the FeaturesPage. The quantity must be passed through the entire flow (FeaturesPage → CheckoutPage → PaymentSuccess) via URL parameters or navigation state, and the PaymentSuccess page must display the actual selected quantity (not a hardcoded value of 1) in the order summary. The total price shown on PaymentSuccess must also reflect quantity × ₹20,000.
